category_title: Students who use inappropriate physical contact to initiate or enter conversations
minimal_context: The student is working in a cooperative learning group to discuss a picture of farm animals.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's work in our cooperative learning groups to talk about the animals in this picture.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits quietly and does not volunteer information or ask questions while the rest of the group talks.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you see on your side of the picture?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying to share with your group members.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Tugs on another student's clothing to signal their turn because the group is ignoring them) Look at the sheeps and the foots!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's work in our cooperative learning groups to talk about the animals in this picture.

STUDENT: (Sits quietly and does not volunteer information or ask questions while the rest of the group talks.)

TUTOR: What do you see on your side of the picture?

STUDENT: I don’t got none here.

TUTOR: Keep trying to share with your group members.

STUDENT: (Tugs on another student's clothing to signal their turn because the group is ignoring them) Look at the sheeps and the foots!
